messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Terraform Functions

### String Functions

```hcl
locals {
  name  = "app-${var.environment}"
  lower = lower("APP")  # app
  upper = upper("test")  # TEST
  join = join("-", ["a", "b", "c"])  # a-b-c
}
```

### Collection Functions

```hcl
locals {
  length   = length(["a", "b", "c"])  # 3
  lookup   = lookup({a = 1}, "a", 0)     # 1
  merge    = merge({a = 1}, {b = 2})     # {a = 1, b = 2}
}
```

### Conditional

```hcl
locals {
  env = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false
}
```

### split/join

```hcl
locals {
  cidr = "10.0.0.0/16"
  octet = split(".", local.cidr)[0]  # 10
}
```
